name: Par Paradise
address: 866 Island Park Dr Suite 104, Charleston, SC 29492
about: Par Paradise is an exclusive, membership-based indoor golf simulator facility located in the heart of Daniel Island, South Carolina. The venue operates on a membership-only model, offering a premium space for golf enthusiasts to practice, play, and compete in a state-of-the-art environment. With three top-of-the-line TruGolf Commercial Simulator Bays featuring Apogee launch monitors and E6 course software providing access to 100 courses, the facility is designed for serious practice and leisure. The experience is enhanced by a high-end lounge, a multisport arcade with eight games, and a PuttView Interactive Green for augmented reality putting practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TruGolf Apogee launch monitor technology for precise club and ball tracking
Access to 100 global golf courses via high-quality E6 course software
Specialized augmented reality putting system with the PuttView Interactive Green

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed for events; contact for information on local restaurant partnerships
BYOB allowed for events; contact for information on local restaurant partnerships

simulator_hardware.notes: Laser assisted ball placement and high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if club rentals are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, for events and parties, guests are allowed to bring in their own food, drinks, cupcakes, and more.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A golfer can easily complete 18 holes of golf in approximately one hour on the simulator.

faq.question: Is Par Paradise kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly. Members are allowed to bring family, and the venue offers a multisport arcade with eight games that can accommodate up to eight players.
